name: overlay
title: Modal Overlay / Backdrop
description: Full-bleed modal scrim that dims and blurs every plane behind a drawer or dialog. The semi-transparent dark-blue tone is derived from --bg via color-mix; a --strong modifier gives the deeper fullscreen scrim, --contained confines it to a positioned ancestor. Opens/closes with a single .is-open toggle (fade scrim + lift-in dialog), mirroring the live openAddWidget()/closeAddWidget() pattern, and dismisses on backdrop-click, ✕, or Escape. Ships a sample centred dialog box (header, body, footer) so the dimming reads, with hover / focus-visible / disabled states on its close and footer controls.
